rawText: .select-integration img { height: 32px; width: 140px; object-fit: contain; object-position: right; margin-right: 20px; } .select-integration select { min-width: 350px; } .select-integration { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-right: 20px; } .select-integration-container { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .top-level-title { font-family: 'Raleway', sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.1; text-align: center; } .add-integration { width: 140px; } Add integration .top-level-settings { display: flex !important; align-items: center !important; justify-content: space-between !important; margin-top: 20px !important; margin-bottom: 40px !important; } .top-level-title { font-family: Roboto; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #000000; margin: 0 0 8px 0 !important; text-align: start; } .select-integration { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: start; position: relative; max-width: 360px; } .select-integration-container { display: block !important; } .select-integration img { width: 20px; left: 6px; position: absolute; } .select-integration input { text-align: start; padding-left: 30px; } #company-select { padding-left: 30px; min-width: 350px; text-align: left; } .add-integration { margin-top: 8px; } .mb14 { margin-bottom: 14px !important; } .radio-container { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: start; } .radio-container input { margin: 0 10px 0 0; accent-color: #0053CC; width: 20px; height: 20px; } .radio-container label { font-family: Roboto; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.0025em; color: #1A1B24; margin: 0 !important; } .radio-container label a { text-decoration: underline; color: #0053CC; } .top-level-block { width: 50%; } Select synchronization mode Per transaction Summary How to change mode Default Create additional settings Adjustment Advance Advance funding Application fee Application fee refund Balance transfer inbound Balance transfer outbound Captured payment Chargeback Collection transfer Contribution Financing paydown Invoice Invoice payment Issuing authorization hold Issuing authorization release Issuing transaction Issuing transaction refund Issuing transaction refund reversal Order payment Payment Payment failure Payment failure refund Payment network reserve hold Payment network reserve release Payment unreconciled Payout Payout failure Payout minimum balance hold Payout minimum balance release Refund Refund failure Reserve transaction Reserved funds Stripe currency conversion fee Stripe fee Stripe fee refund Subscription payment Synder Checkout payment Tax fee Top up Transfer Transfer reversal General Sales Invoices Products/Services Product mapping Taxes Fees Application Fees Expenses Payouts Multicurrency Auto-import OnOff If you enable this setting (recommended), from now on, Synder will fetch all data from your payment/ecommerce platform. To get past data, please go to Import historical data page>> Auto-sync OnOff Turn on auto-sync Please note that auto-sync will not work without auto-import enabled. .autoSync { position: relative; } .not-sync-alert { display: none; position: absolute; background: #0053CC; border-radius: 4px; padding: 18px 16px; z-index: 1; width: 316px; flex-direction: column; top: 44px; } .not-sync-alert:after { content: ""; background: #0053CC; width: 26px; height: 26px; position: absolute; left: 79px; top: -6px; transform: rotate(0.63turn); z-index: 1; border-radius: 4px; } .no-sync-close-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; position: absolute; right: 0; top: 0; font-size: 22px; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; } .no-sync-close-icon:after { content: "+"; transform: rotate(45deg); } .no-sync-title { font-family: 'Roboto'; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 20px; line-height: 28px; color: #FFFFFF; margin-bottom: 8px; } .no-sync-description { font-family: 'Roboto'; font-style: normal; font-weight: 400; font-size: 14px; line-height: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.0025em; color: #FFFFFF; } .number-input-small { width: 60px; padding: 2px 5px; height: 26px; display: inline-block; margin: 0 5px; } If enabled (recommended), from now on, all new transactions will be synced to your books automatically. If you disable Auto-import setting, Auto-sync won't work. Skip synchronization of duplicated transactions OnOff Upgrade to use If enabled, the already existing transactions in your company will be skipped in the synchronization. Process transactions in multiple currencies. OnOff If disabled, Synder will only sync transactions matching your accounting platform home currency. Other transactions will be skipped. Archive Pending transactions after set number of days OnOff If enabled, Synder will automatically archive transactions that remain in Pending status for longer than the specified
